title: Technical Specifications: Spacecraft of the Imperium and the Rebel Alliance
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:TSC-061.jpg|thumb|right|The cover of ''Technical Specifications: Spacecraft of the Imperium and the Rebel Alliance'']]
'''''Technical Specifications: Spacecraft of the Imperium and the Rebel Alliance''''' was a top-secret publication of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

Several versions of the publication existed. An early version was listed as Document Number T358723Q993D.<ref name="The Farlander Papers">{{StoryCite|story=The Farlander Papers|book=Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)}}</ref> Another version was Document Number V492771R225Y<ref name="X-Wing Guide">''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]''</ref> and its revision was listed as Document Number V492771S18DQ.<ref name="The Stele Chronicles">{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}}</ref>

Compiled by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mordaph Clafdatha]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Jord Kraas]], it was a brief primer on the capabilities and specifications of selected [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]]. Prepared at the orders of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], the publication's primary purpose was to catalog the strengths and weaknesses of these craft in order for Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] to prepare for battle against them. However, the authors of the document didn't get the desired cooperation from their colleagues but after they failed to be allowed access to records and files of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], they ceased their requests, resulting to an incomplete report.

An early copy of the document listed as T358723Q993D was kept in a secret compartment of the Imperial [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Talon (Imperial corvette)|''Talon'']], but acquired by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] during a [[Battle in the Turkana system|raid]] right before an officer was ready to destroy the disks. [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] managed to recover and reconstruct some of the data, and a printout was given to Farlander.

Many Imperial and Rebel starfighter pilots, such as Farlander and [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], studied this book during their training.

==Contents==
"Name/Model#" as listed in the revised edition; entries marked with *are not found in the original version: <!-- These names are copied verbatim from the "Name/Model#" fields in The Stele Chronicles. Please do not correct the typographical errors; they are left in intentionally for reference purposes. -->
*[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65C A2 X-wing]]
*[[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-A4 Y-wing Starfighter]]
*[[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing Starfighter]]
*[[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]]
*[[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]]*
*[[MC80a Star Cruiser|MC80a]] {{C|Mislabeled [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Liberty'' type Star Cruiser]]}}
*[[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|Corellian YT-1300 Transport]]*
*[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Starfighter]]
*[[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptor]]
*[[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bomber]]
*[[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Alpha Class Xg-1 Star Wing]]
*[[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE/Ad]]
*[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lamda'' Class T-4a "Imperial Shuttle"]]
*[[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|Delta Class JV-7 "Escort Shuttle"]]*
*[[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|Delta Class Dx-9]]
*[[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|ATR Assault Transport]]*
*[[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|KDY Escort Carrier]]*
*[[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]]
*[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76-B]]
*[[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 Blockade Runner]]
*[[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-1 class]]
*[[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor Im-418]]*
